base_url.description: Yousign API root. Also usable as a base URL override for tests/proxies.

api_key.description: Yousign API key. Used only for Bearer auth (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>); never logged.

limit.description: Optional per-request record limit, sent as the 'limit' query parameter when set. Omitted entirely when unset.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
